Operation 'HoustonWeb.DeploymentsApiController.create' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable, but description is completely missing. Added details about authentication requirements, expected inputs (package version and targets), return value (deployment object), and side effects (initiates distribution process) to enable AI agents to understand the operation's full context and effects.

data.current_summary: Deploy a package version to target devices or groups
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new deployment to distribute a package version to specified target devices or groups. Requires authentication. Accepts deployment configuration including package version ID and target device/group identifiers. Returns the created deployment object with deployment ID and status. This operation initiates the deployment process and may trigger immediate or scheduled distribution based on configuration.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable, but description is completely missing. Added details about authentication requirements, expected inputs (package version and targets), return value (deployment object), and side effects (initiates distribution process) to enable AI agents to understand the operation's full context and effects.

message: Operation 'HoustonWeb.DevicesApiController.list' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description is missing entirely. Enhanced summary to indicate filtering capability. Added description explaining pagination, return format, and that it returns device objects with relevant properties. Clarified that 6 parameters are available for filtering/pagination to help AI agents understand query capabilities.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a list of devices with optional filtering
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of devices accessible to the authenticated user or organization. Supports filtering by device properties and pagination parameters. Returns an array of device objects containing device ID, name, status, and hardware/software information. Accepts 6 optional filter and pagination parameters to refine results.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description is missing entirely. Enhanced summary to indicate filtering capability. Added description explaining pagination, return format, and that it returns device objects with relevant properties. Clarified that 6 parameters are available for filtering/pagination to help AI agents understand query capabilities.

message: Operation 'HoustonWeb.DevicesApiController.get' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is concise and clear. Description is missing but needed. Added explanation of required parameter (device_id), authentication requirement, and detailed return value information. Referenced the domain schemas (Processor, Disk, Networking, Software, Driver, Update, Feature) to clarify what comprehensive device data includes.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific device by device ID. Requires authentication and valid device_id path parameter. Returns a device object containing comprehensive device details including hardware specifications (processor, disk, networking), software information, drivers, updates, and features. Useful for obtaining complete device inventory data.
data.reasoning: Summary is concise and clear. Description is missing but needed. Added explanation of required parameter (device_id), authentication requirement, and detailed return value information. Referenced the domain schemas (Processor, Disk, Networking, Software, Driver, Update, Feature) to clarify what comprehensive device data includes.

message: Operation 'HoustonWeb.GroupsApiController.list' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description is completely missing. Enhanced summary to indicate filtering capability. Added description explaining pagination support, return format (group objects), and domain context about groups' purpose in device management and deployments.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a list of device groups with optional filtering
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of device groups accessible to the authenticated user or organization. Supports filtering and pagination through 4 optional parameters. Returns an array of group objects containing group ID, name, and member information. Groups are used to organize devices for targeted deployments and management.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description is completely missing. Enhanced summary to indicate filtering capability. Added description explaining pagination support, return format (group objects), and domain context about groups' purpose in device management and deployments.

message: Operation 'HoustonWeb.PackagesApiController.list' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description is missing entirely. Enhanced summary to indicate filtering capability. Added description explaining pagination, return format, and domain context about packages being deployable software distributions.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a list of available packages with optional filtering
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of packages available to the authenticated organization. Supports filtering and pagination through 4 optional parameters. Returns an array of package objects containing package ID, name, description, and metadata. Packages represent software distributions that can be deployed to devices or groups.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description is missing entirely. Enhanced summary to indicate filtering capability. Added description explaining pagination, return format, and domain context about packages being deployable software distributions.

message: Operation 'HoustonWeb.PackagesApiController.get' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and specific about including recent versions. Description is missing but needed. Added explanation of required parameter, authentication requirement, and detailed return structure showing both package metadata and associated version information to help AI agents understand the response format.

data.current_summary: Get a package with recent package versions
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific package including recent package versions by package ID. Requires authentication and valid package_id path parameter. Returns a package object with metadata and an array of recent version objects, each containing version ID, version number, release date, and status. Useful for selecting specific versions for deployment.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and specific about including recent versions. Description is missing but needed. Added explanation of required parameter, authentication requirement, and detailed return structure showing both package metadata and associated version information to help AI agents understand the response format.
